text: I want to talk with people from other countries.
examples: I want to talk with people from other countries.
I'd love to chat with people from all over the world.
paraphrases: I'd love to chat with people from all over the world.
My goal is to communicate easily with people from different countries.
I really want to be able to hold a conversation with foreigners.
I aspire to communicate fluently with people from various cultures.

text: The essence of studying a language is talking with people.
ko: 언어를 공부하는 것의 본질은 사람들과 대화하는 것이다.
examples: The essence of studying a language is talking with people.
The whole point of learning English is to communicate.
paraphrases: The whole point of learning a language is talking with people.
At its core, language learning is about communication.
The heart of studying a language is real conversation.

text: I can spend 30 minutes a day studying English.
ko: 하루에 30분 영어 공부에 쓸 수 있어요.
examples: I can spend 30 minutes a day studying English.
I set aside half an hour every evening to study.
paraphrases: I can set aside 30 minutes a day for English.
I'm able to put in half an hour of study each day.
I can dedicate 30 minutes daily to learning English.
